title: hepetis carinata
intro: Hepetis carinata, also known as Indian prickly poppy or prickly chaff flower, is a flowering plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant contains medicinal properties, particularly the alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hepetis carinata include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimalarial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. The plant is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or oil, and is used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health issues.
